statement.en: Single-particle, multi-parametric microscopy of loaded lipid nanoparticles to reveal structural, size and payload heterogeneity
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargoed thesis with abstract content unavailable for evaluation. No substantive claim, methodology, or results are accessible for truth-value assessment. The categorization as 'cs.AI' appears misaligned with the biophysics/materials science subject matter (lipid nanoparticles, microscopy), suggesting possible metadata error.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 粒子の奥行きを、サイズ・形状・積載物が織りなす多次元の影として見つめる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 同じ外殻も内部は千差万別—単一粒子が隠す多層的な異質性の肖像。
